**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Jintu Technology Co., Ltd. presents a clear case of an asset-light IT systems integration and software shell, contradicting its official classification as a 'Communications Equipment Manufacturer'. Despite a fully paid-in capital of 30 million RMB, the entity reported 0 insured employees in 2024. A zero-headcount operation cannot sustain hardware manufacturing. However, a deep forensic dive into its corporate email structure (@oceansoft.com.cn) reveals its true identity: it is highly likely an affiliated shell, bidding vehicle, or dormant subsidiary linked to 'OceanSoft' (a known IT/software brand). Its core operations—software development, network engineering, and building cabling—are classic asset-light, project-based IT contracting services, leveraging its capital merely for project bidding qualifications rather than physical production.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 76)
Operational Status: ACTIVE (ON PAPER) / ASSET-LIGHT IT CONTRACTING SHELL
